data.title: JPMorgan raises Apple's price target to $315, cites a 27% upside potential, positive outlook on iPhone demand and cost reductions.
data.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has increased its price target for Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) to $315 from $305 ahead of the tech giant's first-quarter earnings report. The bank's analyst, Samik Chatterjee, attributes the price target raise to strong iPhone demand and decreased operating expenses. Chatterjee predicts a potential 27% upside from the current stock price and reaffirms an overweight rating on the stock. Despite recent underperformance, JPMorgan sees this as a good entry point, anticipating solid upcoming demand for the iPhone 17. While concerns linger over rising memory costs and pricing sensitivity affecting demand, Chatterjee remains optimistic about Apple's future. For more details, check the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: $750M in crypto liquidations as Bitcoin dropped to $88K due to Japan's financial crisis, hitting long positions hardest.
data.description: During a recent spike in crypto liquidations, long positions faced the majority of the impact, totaling $750 million. This event occurred as cryptocurrency prices dropped towards $88,000 amidst financial instability in Japan.

data.title: MSC data: 90% of U.S. fisheries meet global sustainable standards, leading in certified environmentally sustainable fishing.
data.description: As of the end of 2025, data revealed by the Marine Stewardship Council (MSC) indicated that 90% of fisheries in the United States meet global sustainable fishing standards. The MSC, a non-profit organization dedicated to combatting overfishing worldwide, shared this news on January 26, 2026. This significant achievement reflects the efforts made within the country to ensure responsible fishing practices are being observed.

data.title: Winston Pierce Invest introduces AI trading strategies in traditional and crypto markets for institutional investors.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, in Montreal, Winston Pierce Invest revealed their latest offering - a set of trading techniques fused with artificial intelligence (AI) to improve decision-making across various asset categories. Tailored for institutional and seasoned investors, this new suite aims to revolutionize the industry by leveraging cutting-edge technology.

data.title: JonesTrading launches new Private Markets platform, appoints Jon Jefferies as MD; focuses on agency trading in private market transactions.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, JonesTrading Institutional Services LLC revealed the introduction of its upgraded Private Markets platform in Los Angeles and New York. This platform expansion aligns with the company's core agency trading values and brings these principles into private market dealings.

data.title: Verde AgriTech reports best intercept: 13.0m at 0.83% TREO incl. 8.0m at 1.01% TREO; 25% of drilled metres ≥0.40% TREO.
data.description: Verde Agritech has shared more assay findings from their current drilling initiative at the Minas Americas Global Alliance Project.

data.title: Earnings season is here with reports from big names like Tesla, Microsoft, and Meta. Key companies to report this week include UnitedHealth, with analysts expecting $2.10 per share on revenue of $113.82 billion. Many other companies are also set to release their earnings.
data.description: This week in earnings season, noteworthy reports included Tesla, Microsoft, and Meta Platforms, among others. On Tuesday, UnitedHealth Group Inc. was in the spotlight with analyst estimates expecting earnings of $2.10 per share and revenue of $113.82 billion. Investors were particularly interested in UnitedHealth's medical care ratio and the company's 2026 financial guidance. Other companies reporting on Tuesday before the market open included UPS, Boeing, NextEra Energy, RTX Corp, American Airlines, General Motors, Union Pacific, Northrop Grumman, and HCA Healthcare. To read the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: LC Sign upgrades MaaS model to offer fast, customized signage solutions for global brands; is world's top manufacturer.
data.description: In Guangzhou, China on January 26, 2026, LC Sign, a top manufacturer of personalized signage, revealed the enhancement of its primary Manufacturing-as-a-Service (MaaS) operating approach. This upgrade is designed to support international brands in streamlining their implementation processes.

data.title: NETSOL names Sardar Abubakr as new CFO; Roger K. Almond to be CAO. Almond previously held CFO position.
data.description: NETSOL has recently appointed Sardar Abubakr, FCCA, as its new Chief Financial Officer. Abubakr will be taking over from Roger K. Almond, who previously held the position. Abubakr, a member of the FCCA, brings a wealth of financial expertise to the role. Almond's departure marks a significant change in senior leadership at the company.

data.title: GM to release Q4 earnings with expected $2.26 per share, up from $1.92 last year. Revenue est. $46.04B. Barclays raises price target to $100.
data.description: On Tuesday, Jan. 27, General Motors Company (NYSE: GM) is set to reveal its fourth-quarter earnings. Analysts anticipate earnings to be $2.26 per share, up from the previous year's $1.92 per share. The consensus estimate for quarterly revenue stands at $46.04 billion compared to last year's $47.7 billion. Barclays analyst Dan Levy, retaining an Overweight rating, raised the price target from $85 to $100. GM's annual dividend yield is currently at 0.75%, with a quarterly dividend of 15 cents per share (60 cents annually). Investors are now considering potential gains from dividends amidst the recent interest in General Motors.

data.title: MACOM promotes two senior leaders to Senior VP level.
data.description: MACOM has recently promoted two senior executives within the company to the position of Senior Vice President. This move reflects a strategic decision to enhance leadership and drive growth within the organization. The individuals promoted bring years of experience and expertise to their new roles, contributing to the company's continued success. This decision highlights MACOM's commitment to recognizing and promoting top talent from within its ranks.

data.title: Vornado's JV finishes $250M refinancing for 7 West 34th Street with Amazon as sole tenant; 5.79% fixed rate loan.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, Vornado Realty Trust revealed that a joint venture it holds a 53% stake in successfully secured a $250 million refinancing deal for 7 West 34th Street, an upscale office building in Manhattan with 477,000 square feet of space. Notably, Amazon occupies the entirety of the office area in the building. The financing, a non-recourse loan, spans five years with an interest-only payment structure and is set to conclude in February 2031. It carries a fixed interest rate of 5.79%.

data.title: Bitcoin's price has reached a long-term bottom as analysts predict stability in the market amidst global uncertainties.
data.description: An analysis of the price of Bitcoin predicts a potential long-term bottom in the BTC price in the upcoming days amid global geopolitical tensions and economic uncertainties affecting the markets. This projection indicates a significant shift in the value of Bitcoin and has caught the attention of investors worldwide. The exact timing and extent of this projected bottom remain uncertain, but experts suggest closely monitoring the BTC price in the near future for potential investment opportunities.

data.title: Wellspect HealthCare launches Surity Female External Catheter in the U.S., aiding women with severe urinary incontinence.
data.description: In a recent announcement made on January 26, 2026, Wellspect HealthCare introduced the Surity™ Female External Catheter in the United States. This novel non-invasive solution is specifically tailored to assist women facing severe urinary challenges. Wellspect HealthCare is a leading worldwide supplier of continence care products and this launch marks a significant development in their offerings. This innovative catheter aims to provide relief and support to women dealing with urinary issues.

data.title: Tharimmune Inc. (NASDAQ: THAR) to expand role as Super Validator on Canton Network, leveraging Canton Coin to support Treasury Strategy.
data.description: Tharimmune, Inc. (NASDAQ: THAR) has enhanced its digital asset treasury strategy by contributing to the Canton Network. As of January 26, 2026, Tharimmune became the first publicly traded company to utilize Canton Coin ("CC") in its efforts to bolster the Canton Network.

data.title: Rare Earth Stocks rise as USA Rare Earth secures $3.1 billion funding, $1.6 billion from US govt. - Investor's Business Daily
data.description: USA Rare Earth recently announced receiving a significant $3.1 billion in funding, with a substantial $1.6 billion contribution from the U.S. government. This news has caused a surge in rare earth stocks, following the revelation of President Trump's involvement with USA Rare Earth.
